concerns.text: FR-008 states 'enforce a a hard timeout of a predefined duration' but does not specify the duration. The idea explicitly requires the pipeline to execute within a '6-hour window'. The spec should explicitly state '6 hours' to ensure the requirement is testable and matches the idea's constraint.

The Assumptions section contains a broken link placeholder: 'The QM9 dataset () contains...'. The idea provides the specific URL (https://figshare.com/articles/dataset/qm9/1224189). This should be filled in to ensure the data source is clearly defined and accessible.
